title: Varen’s Mark
bodyText:
The black void on [[pc-varen|Varen]]'s hand — now past his wrist. Grew visibly when **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]]'s oath flared** (S08, radiant damage). Burns near [[the-eight-legs|the Eight Legs]]' star-signs. "King John had this... and died."

# Nature resolved (grill 2026-07-09)
The mark is **[[eilistraee]]'s own mark** on her chosen — a summons carrying **visions to defy [[lolth]] and flee topside** (moonlight, dancing, a path out). It is **not fatal in itself**. The reason every bearer Varen researched is dead: **Lolth hunts and kills the marked** ([[the-eight-legs]] / [[the-assassin]]). [[kennarea|Kena]] escaped by **amputation** — cutting off the mark to drop off Lolth's web (and abandoning the call). Varen's mark ties him personally to the Chapter-1 climax: freeing caged [[eilistraee]] is his salvation.

**Still live (why this stays open):** Lolth's hunters are actively closing (S24 prep). The mystery is answered; the manhunt is not.
